---
title: "An empirical evaluation of genotype imputation of ancient DNA"
date: 2022-05-30
author:  ["Kristiina Ausmees", "Federico Sánchez Quinto", "Mattias Jakobsson", "Carl Nettelblad"]
publication: "G3, **12**, _jkac089_ (2022)."
categories: ["epigenomics", "ancient DNA", "genomics"]
url_source: https://academic.oup.com/g3journal/article/12/6/jkac089/6575448
url_preprint: 
url_pdf: https://brxt.mendeley.com/document/content/6197ab49-b698-3920-9839-ccd7f7bdb7ed
journ: "G3"
volumen: 12
issue: 6
page: "jkac089"
year: 2022
pub_number: 6
image: "../cover/06_coverge.png"
---
